CustomField.description: Links this Payable to the Payment on Account record that initiated the refund. It is auto-populated when a refund is processed via the ‘Create Refund Payable’ action on a Payment on Account record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Links this Payable to the Payment on Account record that initiated the refund. It is auto-populated when a refund is processed via the ‘Create Refund Payable’ action on a Payment on Account record.
CustomField.label: Payment on Account
